reviews.comment:
Atención correcta y buena predisposición en general.
En el Shop faltan opciones para el almuerzo 🍽, solo Sandwich y poca variedad, al menos ese día.
En YPF Boxes, el Servicio de lubricentro muy bien y el plazo de tiempo acorde a las tareas que se realizan.
Sin demoras para el abastecimiento de combustibles, buena atención del personal.

(Translated by Google)
Good service and a generally positive attitude.
The shop lacked lunch options 🍽, only sandwiches and limited variety, at least that day.
At YPF Boxes, the lube service was excellent and the turnaround time was appropriate for the work being done.
No delays in refueling, and the staff provided good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2dGFXVmhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza !!!!! No hay servicio de gomeria!!!! A ver, son el Automóvil Club Argentino!!! institución de más de 50 años, pero que hoy en dia en pleno centro de Cba no da servicio de reparar una cubierta con la cantidad de autos que circulan. Lamentable!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Shame on you! There's no tire service! Look, they're the Argentine Automobile Club! An institution that's been around for over 50 years, but even today, right in the center of Buenos Aires, they don't offer tire repair services, given the number of cars on the road. Regrettable!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2cG9xNnFBRRAB
